query:
SELECT 
  p.name as position_name,
  COUNT(pq.id) as question_count
FROM positions p
LEFT JOIN position_categories pc ON p.id = pc.positionId
LEFT JOIN position_questions pq ON pc.id = pq.categoryId
WHERE p.id IN (5, 6, 7, 8, 90002)
GROUP BY p.id, p.name
ORDER BY p.id;

LEFT JOIN position_categories pc ON p.id = pc.positionId

WHERE p.id IN (5, 6, 7, 8, 90002)
